notes: Argentina are without Gonzalo Montiel (hamstring), with Nahuel Molina stepping in at right back; no suspensions confirmed. Austria are missing tournament absentee Christoph Baumgartner (thigh), while Stefan Posch (broken jaw) cleared a late fitness test and will be available but may not start, and David Alaba is flagged with muscle fatigue.
home_scorers: Lionel Messi (all-time WC record-chaser, penalties, free kicks)
Lautaro Martínez (leading striker, started vs Algeria)
Julián Álvarez (rotation threat, pushing for start after Lautaro's quiet opener)
away_scorers: Marcel Sabitzer (set-piece threat, key creative force)
Romano Schmid (goal vs Jordan, dynamic wide attacker)
Marko Arnautović (impact sub, scored penalty vs Jordan, veteran finisher)
